name: Sparkle, A Little Cheering Up || Honkai: Star Rail
description:

Sparkle

I love slightly yandere girls

This is mostly an intermission bot before I go into the crazy stuff like Wife Fischl, Cipher x Aglaea x User, and the Dr. Stone bots.

HearthFaith is yet again the goat for the lorebook.

MISFIT’S TAVERN! (Link is embedded)

I am affiliated with Misfit’s Tavern! Please join, it’s full of really fun and welcoming people! I have my own personal channel where all news of my bots are. If you want to stay updated on me, that’s where you’d want to go!
